college_overview.full_name: P. E. S. College of Engineering, Mandya
college_overview.founder: Late Sri K. V. Shankara Gowda
accreditations: AICTE (All India Council for Technical Education) approved
college_overview.vision: PESCE shall be a leading institution imparting quality engineering and management education developing creative and socially responsible professionals.
mission: Provide state of the art infrastructure, motivate the faculty to be proficient in their field of specialization and adopt best teaching-learning practices.
Impart engineering and managerial skills through competent and committed faculty using outcome based educational curriculum.
Inculcate professional ethics, leadership qualities and entrepreneurial skills to meet the societal needs.
Promote research, product development and industry-institution interaction.
college_overview.quality_policy: Highly committed in providing quality, concurrent technical education and continuously striving to meet expectations of stake holders

required_documents: CET/COMED-K Allotment Order and Rank Card

academics.branch_change: Permitted at start of 3rd semester based on 1st-year CGPA and seat availability

amenities: Air-conditioned 400 seater auditorium with Audio-visual facility

facilities.cooperative_society: Campus Cooperative Society for stationery and supplies
facilities.wifi: Available across academic blocks, central library, and hostel premises

Admission.question: How do I get admission to PESCE?
Admission.answer: Admission is through Karnataka CET (code E023), COMED-K (code E089), or Management Quota/UNAIDED (code E058). Attend counseling after clearing entrance exams and select PESCE.

Admission.question: What are the admission codes?
Admission.answer: CET: E023, UNAIDED (Management): E058, COMED-K: E089.

Admission.question: What documents are needed for admission?
Admission.answer: 10th & 12th marks cards, Transfer Certificate, Entrance Exam Rank Card & Allotment Order, Aadhaar copy, Caste/Income certificate (if applicable), and 4 passport size photos.

Admission.question: What's the fee structure?
Admission.answer: Fees vary by quota. CET students pay government-subsidized fees, COMED-K students pay standard private fees, and Management quota varies by branch. Check pesce.ac.in/admissions.php for current fee PDFs.

Admission.question: Who is the admission coordinator?
Admission.answer: Manish Kumar S is the Admissions Coordinator. Contact: +91 94482 82588 or admissions@pesce.ac.in. PRO: Mr. S. Nandeesha (+91 9448573099).

Admission.question: Is lateral entry available?
Admission.answer: Yes, lateral entry is available with 10% intake from 2nd year for diploma holders.

Admission.question: Can I apply for multiple admission types?
Admission.answer: Yes, you can appear for CET and COMED-K both, but seat is locked under only one quota at admission time.

Academic.question: How many years is the B.E. course?
Academic.answer: Standard B.E. is 4 years (8 semesters). M.Tech/MCA/MBA are 2 years. Ph.D duration varies.

Academic.question: What's the difference between CSE and CSE(AI&ML)?
Academic.answer: CSE covers general software engineering. CSE(AI&ML) specializes in artificial intelligence, neural networks, and data science from early semesters.

Academic.question: Is PESCE autonomous?
Academic.answer: Yes! PESCE is autonomous under VTU since 2008-09, designing its own curriculum and conducting exams independently.

Academic.question: What's the exam pattern?
Academic.answer: CIE (50 marks) + SEE (50 marks) = 100 marks total per subject.

Academic.question: Can I change my branch?
Academic.answer: Yes, at the start of 3rd semester based on 1st-year CGPA and seat availability.

Academic.question: What programs does PESCE offer?
Academic.answer: 13 B.E. programs (CSE, ISE, ECE, EEE, ME, Civil, AIML, Data Science, CSBS, Automobile, IPE, Robotics, VLSI), 4 M.Tech programs, MCA, MBA, and Ph.D.

Placement.question: What's the average placement package?
Placement.answer: Average ranges 5-8 LPA, with top roles exceeding 12-15+ LPA depending on branch and skills.

Placement.question: Which companies visit PESCE?
Placement.answer: 350+ companies including TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Capgemini, HCL, IBM, Deloitte, Cisco, Amazon, Mercedes Benz, Bosch, L&T, Oracle, SAP, Intel.

Placement.question: What's the placement percentage?
Placement.answer: Typically 85-90%+ for CSE and IT branches. Overall 549 students placed with 1034 total offers.

Placement.question: Who is the placement officer?
Placement.answer: Deepthi K P is the Placement Officer. Contact: placement@pesce.ac.in, +91 94482 82589. Asst: Madhusudhan M S (+91 8970174797).

Placement.question: What training programs are available?
Placement.answer: Soft-skills, personality development, communication, aptitude, interview/GD, self-motivation, and pre-placement industry interactions.

Placement.question: When does placement season start?
Placement.answer: Campus drives begin at the start of 7th semester (final year). Pre-placement internships available in 7th/8th semester.

Hostel.question: What are the hostel details?
Hostel.answer: Boys: 350 capacity (89 single + 21 double + 73 triple rooms), Warden: Dr. Srinivasa M R (+91 94482 82593). Girls: 371 capacity (67 double + 79 triple rooms), Warden: Shwetha M K (+91 94482 82595).

Hostel.question: What hostel facilities are available?
Hostel.answer: Free medical, library, TV room, Wi-Fi, solar water heaters, CCTV, playground, vehicle parking, and separate mess.

Hostel.question: Who are the hostel wardens?
Hostel.answer: Boys Warden: Dr. Srinivasa M R (+91 94482 82593/9980329132). Girls Warden: Shwetha M K (+91 94482 82595). Boys Manager: Girish K P (+91 91413 36956). Girls Manager: Nanda (+91 95905 54700).

Hostel.question: Are hostels mandatory?
Hostel.answer: No, hostels are optional. Day scholars can commute. Many PG/rental options exist near campus.

Hostel.question: What's the hostel cost?
Hostel.answer: Annual room rent + monthly mess bills. Contact wardens for current rates or see hostel fee PDF on the website.

Facilities.question: What facilities does the campus have?
Facilities.answer: Library (13,099 sq ft), hostels, dispensary (24/7), canteen (250 capacity), sports complex (cricket, swimming, tennis), bank ATM, cooperative society, guest house, Wi-Fi, and 24/7 CCTV security.

Facilities.question: Is there a medical facility?
Facilities.answer: Yes, campus dispensary with Dr. Nakul N Rao available 24/7 for emergencies.

Facilities.question: Are there sports facilities?
Facilities.answer: Cricket stadium, swimming pool, tennis courts, and playground. Active sports activities throughout the year.

Facilities.question: Is WiFi available?
Facilities.answer: Yes, Wi-Fi across academic blocks, central library, and hostel premises.

Facilities.question: Is there a canteen?
Facilities.answer: Yes, canteen with 250 capacity serving South Indian and North Indian cuisine.

General.question: How do I contact the college?
General.answer: Admissions: +91 94482 82588 / admissions@pesce.ac.in. Principal Office: 08232 220043. Placements: placement@pesce.ac.in.

General.question: Where is PESCE located?
General.answer: PES College of Engineering is in Mandya, Karnataka, on the Bangalore-Mysore highway. Easily accessible by road.

General.question: Who is the principal?
General.answer: The current principal is Dr. N.L. Murali Krishna. Vice Principal: Dr. Vinay S.

General.question: What is the college's NAAC grade?
General.answer: PESCE holds NAAC A Grade accreditation and is NBA accredited.

General.question: Does PESCE have NSS?
General.answer: Yes, PESCE has an active National Service Scheme (NSS) chapter for community service activities.

General.question: What professional bodies are active?
General.answer: ISTE, IEEE, and CSI student chapters are active with regular technical events and workshops.

General.question: Is there student counselling?
General.answer: Yes, Dr. Bindiya J (Psychiatrist, MIMS) serves as the Student Counsellor at PESCE.
